name: PER_USERS
description: Table for storing one record per fusion system user. Maps to a single LDAP user unless the user is deleted in LDAP.

columns.Name: USER_ID
columns.Comments: Mandatory Primary Key Updatable While New Key Generation

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: ACTIVE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to mark when a user record that has been deleted in LDAP. This is not set to 'N' when a user is just suspended.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: The date that the user is active from.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: The date that the user ceases to be active in fusion.

columns.Name: USER_GUID
columns.Comments: The latest user Guid of the user.

columns.Name: USERNAME
columns.Comments: The latest principal username of the user

columns.Name: MULTITENANCY_USERNAME
columns.Comments: Display Username of the user

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person ID in HCM for this user (if available)

columns.Name: PARTY_ID
columns.Comments: Party ID in TCA for this user (if available)

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: HR_TERMINATED
columns.Comments: Implies the user is terminated in HR by HR.

columns.Name: SUSPENDED
columns.Comments: When the user, as part of termination, is suspended. If suspended, the user can be reactivated.

columns.Name: USER_DISTINGUISHED_NAME
columns.Comments: The latest distinguished name of the user

columns.Name: USER_DATA_CHECKSUM
columns.Comments: User Data Checksum.

columns.Name: CREDENTIALS_EMAIL_SENT
columns.Comments:
Flag to show whether credentials (username/password) has been sent out.

Y=Sent
N=Not Sent

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_ID
columns.Comments: EXTERNAL_ID
